name: @ickb/tester
description: Simulator of iCKB limit order creation
author: phroi

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ickb/utils --filter @ickb/dao --filter @ickb/core --filter @ickb/order --filter @ickb/sdk --filter @ickb/node-utils build && pnpm clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.start: [ -n "$CHAIN" ] || { echo 'CHAIN not set (testnet|mainnet)' >&2; exit 1; }; bash -o pipefail -c 'node --env-file="env/${CHAIN}/.env" dist/index.js | tee "log_${CHAIN}_$(date +%F_%H-%M-%S).json"'
